intended_use: FPDS admin product-collection test answer key for Big 5 chequing, savings, and GIC collection.

scope.product_boundary: Public Canadian personal retail deposit products and product families present in the approved source registry or official rate/entry pages reviewed for this fixture.
exclusions: registered-plan wrapper pages unless the source itself presents a deposit or GIC product row

rate_capture_policy: Use a concrete numeric value only when the current official public source exposed it in captured text. Use null when the official page rendered a placeholder, rate-service token, authenticated lookup, branch-only instruction, or market-linked/non-fixed return that is not a comparable annual posted rate.
